docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BURR, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT SEAMAN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURR, BEVERLY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURR, BEVERLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEAMAN, RICHARD THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S VIABLE CLAIMS WERE BASED ON ORAL AGREEMENTS, WHICH ARE NOW TIME - BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURR, BEVERLY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BURR, BEVERLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-27-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEAMAN, RICHARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.
